_comment: Consistent ecosystem versioning (single source of truth). 'ecosystem' mirrors the root VERSION file and .claude-plugin/plugin.json. Every skill + shared engine carries a semver so a change is traceable and a specific component can be rolled back independently. On a major failure, tools/rollback.py restores a target to a prior version (a git ref) with HUMAN APPROVAL — unless a deployment granted auto_rollback — and logs the failure to ledger/rollback-log.json. Policy: CHANGE_MANAGEMENT.md (Versioning & rollback); each skill's MAINTAINER.md update checklist references it. Consistency is checked by tools/version.py --check; drift is watched by tools/registry_currency.py.
